# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service.mydomain.com
    routes:
      - name: user-route
        paths:
          - /users
        strip_path: false

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service.mydomain.com
    routes:
      - name: order-route
        paths:
          - /orders
        strip_path: false

  - name: payment-service
    url: http://payment-service.mydomain.com
    routes:
      - name: payment-route
        paths:
          - /payments
        strip_path: false

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      minute: 100
    apply_to_routes:
      - user-route
      - order-route
      - payment-route

  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
    apply_to_services:
      - user-service
      - order-service
      - payment-service

  - name: logging
    config:
      log_level: info
    apply_to_routes:
      - user-route
      - order-route
      - payment-route
